conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connections with E, D, and B because we bonded deeply over our shared drive to provide for our families and even discussed specific goals like my brother's education. E and D both stood out because we explicitly committed to looking out for one another and prioritizing cooperation to keep the prize pool high. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to H, as our conversation remained fairly surface-level and we both admitted to being guarded and sizing everyone else up.

I made clear agreements with E and D to stick together and support each other once the game begins. I feel I can trust them the most right now because our motivations and strategies for cooperation align so perfectly. While I'm staying cautious of the group as a whole, I'm going into the game feeling like I have a solid foundation with those two.
